name: fod-pattern-library
description: 51Degrees documentation design system. SCSS compiled with Vite; previewed with Storybook.
author: 51Degrees

scripts.build:css: vite build && esbuild source/css/docs-main.css --minify --outfile=source/css/docs-main.min.css && esbuild source/css/main.css --minify --outfile=source/css/main.min.css && esbuild source/css/conf-main.css --minify --outfile=source/css/conf-main.min.css && esbuild source/css/examples-main.css --minify --outfile=source/css/examples-main.min.css && esbuild source/js/examples.js --minify --outfile=source/js/examples.min.js
